debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ |(↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n| ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n

failed_attempts:
rw [abs_le]
    have := mem_range.1 hℓ
    constructor <;>
      { field_simp
        nlinarith [hab] }

rw [abs_le]
    constructor <;>
    · field_simp
      nlinarith [hab, Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk]

rw [abs_le]
    constructor <;> field_simp <;> linarith [mem_range.1 hℓ, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt h1 hfine

have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)
    have k_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)
    have ba_pos : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
    have l_le_k : (ℓ : ℝ) + 1 ≤ k := by norm_cast; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (mem_range.mp hℓ)
    rw [abs_sub_le_iff]
    constructor <;> field_simp <;> linarith

rw [abs_sub_le_iff]
    have : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
    constructor <;> field_simp <;> nlinarith [mem_range.mp hℓ]

rw [show (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n = (b - a) / ↑n * ((↑ℓ + 1) / ↑k - 1) by
      field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hn, Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hk]; ring]
    have h_pos : 0 < (b - a) / ↑n := div_pos (sub_pos.mpr hab) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
    rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos h_pos, mul_le_mul_left h_pos, abs_le]
    constructor
    · field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hk]; linarith
    · field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hk]; linarith [mem_range.mp hℓ]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt h1 hfine

have hpos : 0 < (b - a) / n := div_pos (sub_pos.mpr hab) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
    rw [show (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n = (b - a) / ↑n * ((↑ℓ + 1) / ↑k - 1) by field_simp [hn, hk]; ring]
    rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos hpos, mul_comm 2]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (le_of_lt hpos)
    rw [abs_le]
    have := mem_range.mp hℓ
    constructor <;> field_simp [hk] <;> linarith

rw [show (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n = (b - a) / n * ((↑ℓ + 1) / k - 1) by field_simp; ring]
    rw [abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg (by apply div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (le_of_lt hab)); exact Nat.cast_nonneg n)]
    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (by apply div_nonneg (sub_nonneg.mpr (le_of_lt hab)); exact Nat.cast_nonneg n)
    rw [abs_le, sub_le_iff_le_add, le_sub_iff_add_le]
    have hk' : 0 < (k : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk)
    constructor
    · apply le_trans (by norm_num : (-1:ℝ) ≤ 0) (div_nonneg (by norm_cast; linarith) hk')
    · apply le_trans _ (by norm_num : (1:ℝ) ≤ 3); rw [div_le_one hk']; norm_cast; exact Nat.succ_le_of_lt (mem_range.mp hℓ)

rw [div_mul_eq_div_div, ← mul_div_assoc, ← mul_sub, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (div_pos (sub_pos.mpr hab) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn)))]
    gcongr
    rw [abs_sub_le_iff]
    have := Finset.mem_range.mp hℓ
    constructor <;> field_simp <;> linarith

rw [show (↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n = (b - a) / ↑n * ((↑ℓ + 1) / ↑k - 1) by field_simp; ring]

    apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left _ (le_of_lt (div_pos (sub_pos.2 hab) (Nat.cast_pos.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))))

    constructor <;> { field_simp; linarith }

rw [div_mul_eq_div_div, mul_comm (↑ℓ + 1), mul_div_right_comm, mul_div_assoc, ← mul_sub, abs_mul]
    have h_pos : 0 < (b - a) / n := div_pos (sub_pos.mpr hab) (Nat.cast_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
